actions.text: The "after" looking effortless is the whole illusion — there's always 3 donate bags out of frame. What's your reset cadence on a space like this?
Baby girl already so loved — what a sweet shower!! One tip from organizing tons of nurseries: drawer dividers for those tiny socks and onesies will save your sanity in month two 🤍
actions.caption_seen: This will forever be one of the best days of my life !! Feeling so grateful baby girl is already so loved as we await her arrival soon!! 🥹💕 #babyshower

actions.text: The drawer dividers are the unsung hero here — most people skip them and wonder why their cabinets revert in a week. Did you label the back of each bin too, or just the fronts?
